tools.name: iap_author
tools.description: Author IaP from a natural-language requirement. Runs the intent compiler (extract → clarify → gate). Returns the outcome, clarifications, a semantic preview, and — only when it fully commits — the document and its per-field provenance. Never writes to disk or deploys.

request.description: The natural-language infrastructure requirement to author from.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp for deterministic authoring (defaults to epoch).

autoAnswerDefaults.description: Auto-answer clarifications with their defaults where safe.

tools.name: iap_compliance
tools.description: Evaluate active compliance framework bundles and return the evidence report (ch. 17). Read-only.

document.description: The IaP document text (YAML) to analyse.

tools.name: iap_cost
tools.description: Estimate cost and evaluate budgets for an IaP document (ch. 16). Read-only.

document.description: The IaP document text (YAML) to analyse.

tools.name: iap_security
tools.description: Derive the security posture (grants, reachability, IAP6xx findings) for an IaP document (ch. 15). Read-only.

document.description: The IaP document text (YAML) to analyse.

tools.name: iap_validate
tools.description: Validate an IaP document (phases 1–5) and return the findings. Read-only.

document.description: The IaP document text (YAML) to analyse.
